# Cherubim

> Cherubim is an agentic AI red team that runs automated penetration testing
> across the entire cybersecurity stack and orchestrated omnichannel social
> engineering, then proves every finding and maps it to compliance frameworks.

Cherubim is a product of Hesed & Emet Advisory, a Singapore advisory working
where AI, cybersecurity and human behaviour collide. It is a sibling product
to Aegis, the same company's AI security operations platform.

## What Cherubim does

- Autonomous offensive engine: a swarm of reasoning agents that maps,
  exploits and chains weaknesses, with deterministic validation so no
  finding ships without reproducible proof.
- Full stack attack coverage: external and internal network, web, API,
  mobile, cloud, Kubernetes, identity, Active Directory, wireless, OT and
  supply chain, run as one continuous kill chain.
- Orchestrated omnichannel social engineering: phishing email, SMS,
  WhatsApp, voice cloning, live deepfake video on Zoom, Teams and Meet,
  and Slack and Teams follow up, under one adaptive narrative.
- Compliance and reporting: one click mapping to NIST CSF 2.0 and SP
  800-53, the Singapore Cybersecurity Act, the CSA Cyber Trust and Cyber
  Essentials marks, ISO/IEC 27001, MAS TRM, PDPA, MITRE ATT&CK and CIS
  Controls, plus board, CISO, engineering and audit reporting views.

## Key facts

- Category: agentic AI red team, automated penetration testing, adversary
  simulation, social engineering simulation.
- Differentiator: deterministic validation, no proof means no finding.
- Safety: signed authorization gate, consent for cloned personas,
  stand down on distress, watermarked synthetic media, never causes real
  loss.
- Region: Singapore and Asia Pacific.
- Contact: hello@hesedemet.asia

## Links

- Site: https://cherubim.github.io/
- Parent advisory: https://www.hesedemet.asia
